name: Afghan Border Forces — Kunar Retaliation (Mar 24)
detail: Afghan Taliban border forces returned fire across the Durand Line within minutes of the Eid ceasefire expiring on March 24, 2026. Afghan forces claimed to have destroyed three Pakistani military posts and killed one person — claims Pakistan did not acknowledge. Artillery and small-arms fire exchanged in Kunar and Zabul provinces.

name: Afghan Forces Claim Destruction of 3 Pakistani Posts — Sarkano (Mar 25)
detail: Afghan border forces claimed to have destroyed three Pakistani military posts in the Nawapas area of Sarkano district, Kunar province, on March 25, 2026, in response to the 85-shell artillery barrage. Afghan MoD stated one Pakistani soldier was killed. Pakistan did not publicly confirm or deny the Afghan claims.

name: Afghan Sniper Attack — Torkham FC Post (Mar 27)
detail: Afghan sniper shot a Pakistani Frontier Corps Subedar at the Awal Khan post near Torkham border crossing on the night of March 27, 2026. At least 2 personnel injured. The attack led Pakistan to immediately close Torkham, suspend Afghan deportations, and impose a curfew in surrounding areas.
